nasb.text: Then Micah said, “Now I know that the Lord will prosper me, seeing I have a Levite as priest.”

esv.text: Then Micah said, “Now I know that the Lord will prosper me, because I have a Levite as priest.”

cnv.text: 米迦說：“現在我知道耶和華必善待我，因為有一個利未人作我的祭司。”

ccb.text: 米迦说：“现在我有一个利未人做我的祭司，耶和华一定会赐福给我。”
